     5	import { MessageSquarePlus } from 'lucide-react'
     6	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
     8	
     9	interface SelectionCommentPopupProps {
    10	  onAdd: (text: string, anchor: CommentAnchor) => void
    11	}
    12	
    13	export function SelectionCommentPopup({ onAdd }: SelectionCommentPopupProps) {
    14	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    15	  const [position, setPosition] = useState<{
    16	    top: number
    17	    left: number
    18	  } | null>(null)
    19	  const [showInput, setShowInput] = useState(false)
    20	  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState('')
    21	  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    22	
    23	  useEffect(() => {
    24	    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    25	      editorState.read(() => {
    26	        const selection = $getSelection()
    27	        if (
    28	          !$isRangeSelection(selection) ||
    29	          selection.isCollapsed() ||
    30	          showInput
    31	        ) {
    32	          if (!showInput) setPosition(null)
    33	          return
    34	        }
    35	
    36	        const nativeSelection = window.getSelection()
    37	        if (!nativeSelection || nativeSelection.rangeCount === 0) {
    38	          setPosition(null)
    39	          return
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        const range = nativeSelection.getRangeAt(0)
    43	        const rect = range.getBoundingClientRect()
    44	        if (rect.width === 0) {
    45	          setPosition(null)
    46	          return
    47	        }
    48	
    49	        setPosition({
    50	          top: rect.top - 40,
    51	          left: rect.left + rect.width / 2,
    52	        })
    53	      })
    54	    })
    55	  }, [editor, showInput])
    56	
    57	  const handleClick = useCallback(() => {
    58	    setShowInput(true)
    59	    requestAnimationFrame(() => inputRef.current?.focus())
    60	  }, [])
    61	
    62	  const handleSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    63	    const text = inputText.trim()
    64	    if (!text) return
    65	
    66	    const result = buildRangeAnchor(editor)
    67	    if (!result.ok) return
    68	
    69	    onAdd(text, result.anchor)
    70	    setInputText('')
    71	    setShowInput(false)
    72	    setPosition(null)
    73	  }, [editor, inputText, onAdd])
    74	
    75	  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    76	    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    77	      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
    78	        e.preventDefault()
    79	        handleSubmit()
    80	      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    81	        setShowInput(false)
    82	        setInputText('')
    83	      }
    84	    },
    85	    [handleSubmit],
    86	  )
    87	
    88	  const handleCancel = useCallback(() => {
    89	    setShowInput(false)
    90	    setInputText('')
    91	  }, [])
    92	
    93	  if (!position) return null
    94	
    95	  return createPortal(
    96	    <div
    97	      className="comment-selection-popup"
    98	      style={{ top: position.top, left: position.left }}
    99	    >
   100	      {showInput ? (
   101	        <div className="comment-inline-input">
   102	          <input
   103	            ref={inputRef}
   104	            type="text"
   105	            value={inputText}
   106	            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   107	            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   108	            placeholder="Add a comment..."
   109	            className="comment-input"
   110	          />
   111	          <button className="btn btn-sm btn-active" onClick={handleSubmit}>
   112	            Add
   113	          </button>
   114	          <button className="btn btn-sm" onClick={handleCancel}>
   115	            Cancel
   116	          </button>
   117	        </div>
   118	      ) : (
   119	        <button className="comment-add-btn" onClick={handleClick}>
   120	          <MessageSquarePlus size={14} />
   121	          Comment
   122	        </button>
   123	      )}
   124	    </div>,
   125	    document.body,
   126	  )
   127	}

    12	
    13	function findDomTextNode(
    14	  container: Node,
    15	  targetOffset: number,
    16	): { node: Text; offset: number } | null {
    17	  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)
    18	  let consumed = 0
    19	  let textNode: Text | null
    20	  while ((textNode = walker.nextNode() as Text | null)) {
    21	    const len = textNode.textContent?.length ?? 0
    22	    if (consumed + len >= targetOffset) {
    23	      return { node: textNode, offset: targetOffset - consumed }
    24	    }
    25	    consumed += len
    26	  }
    27	  return null
    28	}
    29	
    30	export function CommentHighlightPlugin({
    31	  comments,
    32	  activeId,
    33	}: CommentHighlightPluginProps) {
    34	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (typeof CSS === 'undefined' || !('highlights' in CSS)) return
    38	
    39	    const highlights = (CSS as any).highlights as Map<string, Highlight>
    40	
    41	    function updateHighlights() {
    42	      const normalRanges: Range[] = []
    43	      const activeRanges: Range[] = []
    44	
    45	      const rangeComments = comments.filter((c) => c.anchor.mode === 'range')
    46	      if (rangeComments.length === 0) {
    47	        highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
    48	        highlights.delete('comment-highlight-active')
    49	        return
    50	      }
    51	
    52	      editor.read(() => {
    53	        const root = $getRoot()
    54	        const children = root.getChildren()
    55	
    56	        for (const comment of rangeComments) {
    57	          const { anchor } = comment
    58	          if (anchor.mode !== 'range') continue
    59	
    60	          const block = children.find(
    61	            (c) => $getState(c, blockIdState) === anchor.blockId,
    62	          )
    63	          if (!block) continue
    64	
    65	          const dom = editor.getElementByKey(block.getKey())
    66	          if (!dom) continue
    67	
    68	          const start = findDomTextNode(dom, anchor.startOffset)
    69	          const end = findDomTextNode(dom, anchor.endOffset)
    70	          if (!start || !end) continue
    71	
    72	          try {
    73	            const range = new Range()
    74	            range.setStart(start.node, start.offset)
    75	            range.setEnd(end.node, end.offset)
    76	            if (comment.id === activeId) {
    77	              activeRanges.push(range)
    78	            } else {
    79	              normalRanges.push(range)
    80	            }
    81	          } catch {
    82	            // offset out of bounds after edit
    83	          }
    84	        }
    85	      })
    86	
    87	      if (normalRanges.length > 0) {
    88	        highlights.set('comment-highlight', new Highlight(...normalRanges))
    89	      } else {
    90	        highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
    91	      }
    92	
    93	      if (activeRanges.length > 0) {
    94	        highlights.set(
    95	          'comment-highlight-active',
    96	          new Highlight(...activeRanges),
    97	        )
    98	      } else {
    99	        highlights.delete('comment-highlight-active')
   100	      }
   101	    }
   102	
   103	    updateHighlights()
   104	
   105	    const unregister = editor.registerUpdateListener(() => {
   106	      updateHighlights()
   107	    })
   108	
   109	    return () => {
   110	      unregister()
   111	      highlights.delete('comment-highlight')
   112	      highlights.delete('comment-highlight-active')
   113	    }
   114	  }, [editor, comments, activeId])
   115	
   116	  return null
   117	}

    11	
    12	function formatRelativeTime(ts: number): string {
    13	  const diff = Date.now() - ts
    14	  const seconds = Math.floor(diff / 1000)
    15	  if (seconds < 60) return 'just now'
    16	  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)
    17	  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`
    18	  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60)
    19	  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`
    20	  return `${Math.floor(hours / 24)}d ago`
    21	}
    22

    24	  comments,

    46	          onMouseEnter={() => onHover(comment.id)}

    28

    33	            break

    34	  ...katexEditNodes,
    35	  ...galleryEditNodes,
    36	  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
    37	]
    38	
    39	export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    40	  RichEditorProps,
    41	  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    42	> {
    43	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    44	  actions?: ReactNode
    45	  selfHostnames?: string[]
    46	  extraMentionPlatforms?: MentionPlatformDef[]
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function ShiroEditor({
    50	  extraNodes,
    51	  actions,
    52	  children,
    53	  selfHostnames,
    54	  extraMentionPlatforms,
    55	  ...props
    56	}: ShiroEditorProps) {
    57	  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    58	    () =>
    59	      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    60	    [extraNodes],
    61	  )
    62	
    63	  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    64	    ({
    65	      url,
    66	      linkKey,
    67	      actionButtonClassName,
    68	    }: {
    69	      url: string
    70	      linkKey: string
    71	      actionButtonClassName: string
    72	    }) => (
    73	      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
    74	        url={url}
    75	        linkKey={linkKey}
    76	        className={actionButtonClassName}
    77	      />
    78	    ),
    79	    [],
    80	  )
    81	
    82	  return (
    83	    <RichEditor
    84	      {...props}
    85	      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    86	      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    87	      actions={
    88	        <>
    89	          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    90	          <MentionMenuPlugin extraPlatforms={extraMentionPlatforms} />
    91	          {actions}
    92	        </>
    93	      }
    94	    >
    95	      <BlockHandlePlugin />
    96	      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
    97	      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
    98	      <TldrawPlugin />
    99	      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />

   102	      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
   103	      {children}

   105	  )
   106	}

    34	    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    35	    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    36	  }, [])
    37	
    38	  return scheme
    39	}

+/* ── Comments Page ── */
+.comments-layout {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 24px;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+}
+
+.comments-editor {
+  flex: 1;
+  position: relative;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.comments-sidebar {
+  width: 320px;
+  flex-shrink: 0;
+  position: sticky;
+  top: 88px;
+}
+
+/* ── Comment Gutter ── */
+.comment-gutter {
+  position: absolute;
+  top: 0;
+  right: -40px;
+  width: 32px;
+  pointer-events: none;
+}
+
+.comment-gutter-item {
+  position: absolute;
+  right: 0;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 4px;
+  flex-direction: row-reverse;
+  pointer-events: auto;
+}
+
+.comment-gutter-count {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 2px;
+  font-size: 11px;
+  color: var(--demo-accent);
+  background: var(--demo-accent-bg);
+  padding: 2px 6px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  font-weight: 600;
+  white-space: nowrap;
+}
+
+.comment-gutter-btn {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  width: 24px;
+  height: 24px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border);
+  border-radius: 6px;
+  background: var(--demo-surface);
+  color: var(--demo-text-muted);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: all 0.15s;
+  padding: 0;
+  font-size: 0;
+}
+
+.comment-gutter-btn:hover {
+  background: var(--demo-accent-bg);
+  border-color: var(--demo-accent);
+  color: var(--demo-accent);
+}
+
+.comment-gutter-input {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 4px;
+  align-items: center;
+  position: absolute;
+  right: 0;
+  white-space: nowrap;
+}
+
+/* ── Selection Popup ── */
+.comment-selection-popup {
+  position: fixed;
+  z-index: 100;
+  transform: translateX(-50%);
+  animation: comment-popup-in 0.12s ease-out;
+}
+
+@keyframes comment-popup-in {
+  from {
+    opacity: 0;
+    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(4px);
+  }
+  to {
+    opacity: 1;
+    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
+  }
+}
+
+.comment-add-btn {

+}

     5	interface OnChangePluginProps {

     7	  debounceMs?: number
     8	}
     9	
    10	export function OnChangePlugin({ onChange, debounceMs }: OnChangePluginProps) {
    11	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    12	  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    13	  const onChangeRef = useRef(onChange)
    14	  onChangeRef.current = onChange
    15	
    16	  useEffect(() => {
    17	    const unregister = editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    18	      const fn = onChangeRef.current
    19	      if (!fn) return
    20	
    21	      if (debounceMs && debounceMs > 0) {
    22	        clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
    23	        timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
    24	          fn(editorState.toJSON())
    25	        }, debounceMs)
    26	      } else {
    27	        fn(editorState.toJSON())
    28	      }
    29	    })
    30	
    31	    return () => {
    32	      clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
    33	      unregister()
    34	    }
    35	  }, [editor, debounceMs])
    36	
    37	  return null
    38	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-27 13:58:27Z)**_

**Findings (ordered by severity)**

1. **High**: Selection comment creation can fail because the range anchor is built at submit time, after focus has moved off the editor.  
   - In [`SelectionCommentPopup.tsx:66`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/components/comments/SelectionCommentPopup.tsx:66), `buildRangeAnchor(editor)` runs when clicking `Add`, not when the selection is first captured.  
   - The trigger button also uses plain `onClick` at [`SelectionCommentPopup.tsx:119`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/components/comments/SelectionCommentPopup.tsx:119), so selection loss on mousedown/blur is possible.  
   - Result: “Add” may no-op (`!result.ok`) for valid user flows.  
   - Fix: capture anchor (or full selection snapshot) before focus changes, and/or use `onMouseDown` with `preventDefault()` on popup controls.

2. **Medium**: Block IDs may not be initialized on first render, which can make block/range anchors unavailable until the first editor update.  
   - [`BlockIdPlugin.tsx:20`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/BlockIdPlugin.tsx:20) only normalizes IDs inside `registerUpdateListener`; there is no explicit initial normalization pass on mount.  
   - `BlockCommentGutter` skips blocks without IDs at [`BlockCommentGutter.tsx:44`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/components/comments/BlockCommentGutter.tsx:44).  
   - If no update fires immediately after mount, gutter anchors and `buildRangeAnchor` can return `no-block-id`.  
   - Fix: run one normalization `editor.update(...)` in `useEffect` after registering.

3. **Medium**: Highlight reconstruction can drift/fail for ranges containing line breaks.  
   - Anchor offsets count Lexical line breaks as `+1` at [`comment-anchor.ts:107`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts:107).  
   - DOM remapping in [`CommentHighlightPlugin.tsx:17`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/components/comments/CommentHighlightPlugin.tsx:17) walks only text nodes and does not account for `<br>` nodes.  
   - Result: wrong highlight positions or dropped highlights after multiline edits.  
   - Fix: include `<br>`/line-break accounting in DOM offset mapping.

4. **Low**: Comments page layout is not made responsive, so mobile can overflow.  
   - Two-column layout is fixed at [`demo.css:525`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/demo.css:525) with sidebar width `320px` at [`demo.css:537`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/demo.css:537).  
   - Existing media query at [`demo.css:816`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/demo.css:816) does not adjust `.comments-layout`/`.comments-sidebar`/`.comment-gutter`.

5. **Low**: Deleting the active comment can leave stale `activeCommentId`.  
   - [`CommentsPage.tsx:41`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/CommentsPage.tsx:41) removes from list but doesn’t clear `activeCommentId` if the deleted id was active.  
   - Usually harmless, but it leaves transient stale UI state.

No correctness issues stood out in the `App.tsx` and `EditorPage.tsx` edits themselves.
